summary.zh: 5 位改变生活的发明家与工程师
summary.en: Five inventors and engineers who changed daily life

sections.zh: 詹天佑是中国第一位伟大的铁路工程师。
sections.en: Zhan Tianyou was China's first great railway engineer.

sections.zh: 他主持修建了京张铁路，在陡峭的山里设计了聪明的「人」字形铁路。
sections.en: He built the Beijing–Zhangjiakou railway, with a clever zigzag track up steep mountains.

sections.zh: 他证明了中国人能自己修铁路，激励了许多后来的工程师。
sections.en: He proved Chinese engineers could build railways themselves, inspiring many who came after.

sections.zh: 毕昇是中国宋朝的发明家。
sections.en: Bi Sheng was an inventor in China's Song dynasty.

sections.zh: 他用一个个小泥字拼成文章，印完还能重新排列再用。
sections.en: He made tiny clay characters that could be arranged, printed, and reused.

sections.zh: 他发明的活字印刷，让书籍更容易印制和传播。
sections.en: His movable-type printing made books far easier to make and share.

greatFigures.fieldEn: Engineer who improved the steam engine

sections.zh: 瓦特是英国的发明家和工程师。
sections.en: James Watt was a British inventor and engineer.

sections.zh: 他大大改进了蒸汽机，让机器更省力、更好用。
sections.en: He greatly improved the steam engine, making machines stronger and more useful.

sections.zh: 他的蒸汽机推动了工厂、火车和轮船，开启了工业时代。
sections.en: His steam engine powered factories, trains, and ships, starting the industrial age.

greatFigures.fieldEn: Inventor of the European printing press

sections.zh: 古腾堡是德国的发明家。
sections.en: Johannes Gutenberg was a German inventor.

sections.zh: 他发明了金属活字印刷机，能快速印出很多书。
sections.en: He invented a metal movable-type press that could print many books quickly.

sections.zh: 书籍变得便宜了，更多人能读书学习。
sections.en: Books became cheaper, so many more people could read and learn.

greatFigures.fieldZh: 研究电的科学家与发明家
greatFigures.fieldEn: Scientist and inventor who studied electricity

sections.zh: 富兰克林是美国的科学家、发明家。
sections.en: Benjamin Franklin was an American scientist and inventor.

sections.zh: 传说他在雷雨天放风筝，研究闪电其实是电。
sections.en: The story says he flew a kite in a storm to show that lightning is electricity.

sections.zh: 他还发明了避雷针和双焦点眼镜，帮助了很多人。
sections.en: He also invented the lightning rod and bifocal glasses, helping many people.
